text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.9 46 

PTD_PLAN_CVRG_MONS 

LABEL: Months of Part D Coverage 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary had Medicare Part D 
coverage. CCW derives this variable by counting the number of months where the beneficiary had Part 
D coverage. 

SHORT NAME: PTD_MO 

LONG NAME: PTD_PLAN_CVRG_MONS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS
